name: Ria Money Transfer
description_short: Austin, TX Ria Money Transfer at 104 Robert T Martinez Jr St - Fast money transfer and check cashing services.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer is located at 104 Robert T Martinez Jr St in Austin, TX, operating as a standalone check-cashing store. This street-level location makes it easy to access for Austin residents needing quick financial services without having to navigate inside a larger retail environment.

At the Austin location on Robert T Martinez Jr St, you can send money transfers domestically and internationally, cash checks, and access other money services. Call +1 512-480-0939 to speak with staff about transfer fees, rates, and available services for your specific needs.

If you need to transfer money quickly or cash a check in Austin, bring a valid government-issued ID and any checks you need to process. Ria Money Transfer has been a trusted name in financial services for years, making it a reliable choice when you need fast, accessible banking services.
address: 104 Robert T Martinez Jr St, Austin, TX 78702

company_info.headquarters: 104 Robert T Martinez Jr St, Austin, TX 78702

pros: 600,000+ cash pickup locations across 190+ countries enables access in remote areas competitors may not reach
Multi-channel sending (online, app, in-person, WhatsApp) accommodates diverse user preferences and tech literacy levels
Support for 100+ currencies with real-time exchange rate calculator on homepage
Mobile app with 4.9/5 iOS rating enables transfer tracking and faster repeat transfers
WhatsApp integration for select corridors reduces friction for users in messaging-native markets
35+ years operating history demonstrates stability in a volatile remittance industry
100% satisfaction guarantee reduces perceived risk for first-time users
cons: Specific transfer fees, delivery times, and exchange rate margins not transparent on homepage—comparison shopping requires entering details
Competitive pressure from fintech providers (Wise, OFX, Remitly) offering lower fees and faster digital-only transfers
No visible information on AML/KYC compliance, fraud protection protocols, or regulatory licensing status
Customer reviews are aggregated from self-selecting platforms; negative feedback visibility limited
Physical agent network creates operational complexity and potential inconsistency in service quality across 190+ countries
best_for: Migrant workers and families sending remittances to Mexico and Latin America who value extensive cash pickup networks
Unbanked and underbanked recipients in developing regions without reliable digital payment infrastructure
Users comfortable with traditional in-person money transfer services who lack digital banking or credit card access
Senders in countries with limited fintech adoption who prefer established, brick-and-mortar provider trust signals
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for remittance senders—especially to Latin America—who value the extensive physical cash pickup network over digital-only speed, and for recipients in regions with limited banking infrastructure. Primary caveat: fee structures and delivery times require manual quote entry to compare competitively, and the platform lacks visible transparency on compliance, fraud protection, and regulatory oversight compared to modern fintech alternatives.
services: Online money transfer via website with real-time rate quotes
Mobile app-based transfers with tracking and rate comparison
In-person cash payment at physical agent locations
WhatsApp money transfer to select countries
IBAN calculator for recipient bank details
Transfer tracking with real-time status updates
meta_description: Ria Money Transfer at 104 Robert T Martinez Jr St, Austin, TX. Fast money transfers and check cashing services.
